rentalPolicy.title: Rental Policies
rentalPolicy.subtitle: Manage rental terms, coverage details, and company policies shown in contracts.
rentalPolicy.publicSubtitle: Review our rental terms, coverage details, and company policies.
rentalPolicy.termsContent:
1. INSPECTION & DELIVERY: The customer declares having received the vehicle in good general condition as reflected in the digitally signed checkout inspection form. Any discrepancies must be reported before taking the vehicle.

2. DOCUMENTATION & DRIVER: The main driver must present a valid physical driver's license. Minimum age is 21 years (25 for luxury vehicles). Additional drivers must be registered in the contract and meet the same requirements.

3. RENTAL PERIOD: The vehicle must be returned on the agreed date and time. Extensions must be requested and authorized in writing. Late returns without authorization will incur a per-hour charge according to the current rate, after a 1-hour grace period.

4. SECURITY DEPOSIT: Non-corporate customers are subject to a security deposit hold according to the current rate, released upon returning the vehicle without incidents. Corporate customers are subject to available credit limit verification.

5. DAMAGE RESPONSIBILITY: The customer is responsible for the CDW deductible according to the current policy and assumes full cost of excluded damages: tires, rims, windshield, undercarriage, interior and roof damage, theft of valuables, lost keys, and tow truck costs.

6. FINES & VIOLATIONS: The customer assumes full responsibility for all traffic fines, violations, tolls, and parking charges during the rental period. Authorizes FleetVault to process these charges to the registered payment method.

7. FUEL: The vehicle is delivered with a full tank and must be returned in the same state. Otherwise, the current service fee will apply.

8. PROHIBITED USES: Driving under the influence of alcohol or drugs, participating in competitions, transporting illegal materials, subleasing, off-road driving, or taking the vehicle outside the Dominican Republic is strictly prohibited.

9. TERRITORIAL LIMIT: The vehicle may be driven throughout the national territory. Border areas (Dajabón, Jimaní, Pedernales, Elías Piña) require prior authorization. Taking the vehicle outside the country is strictly prohibited.

10. CANCELLATIONS: Cancellations made more than 48 hours in advance incur no charge. Late cancellations or no-shows will incur a charge equivalent to one day of rental.

11. CDW COVERAGE: Applies only if the main driver meets all license, age, and documentation requirements. Non-compliance voids all coverage.

12. SUBSEQUENT CHARGES: The customer authorizes FleetVault to process additional charges for damages, fines, or costs identified up to 15 days after vehicle return.

13. FORCE MAJEURE: FleetVault shall not be liable for non-compliance due to hurricanes, natural disasters, civil unrest, pandemics, or events beyond its reasonable control.

14. APPLICABLE LAW: This contract is governed by the laws of the Dominican Republic. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of the Dominican Republic.
